title: commercetools Order
description: An order created from a cart upon successful checkout in a commercetools Composable Commerce project. Orders capture the immutable state of line items, pricing, addresses, and payment information at the time of purchase.

id.description: System-generated unique identifier for the order.

version.description: Current version of the order resource for optimistic concurrency control.

key.description: User-defined unique key for the order.

orderNumber.description: Human-readable order number, unique within the project.

purchaseOrderNumber.description: A purchase order number for business-to-business order references.

customerId.description: ID of the customer who placed the order.

customerEmail.description: Email address of the customer at time of order creation.

customerGroup.description: Customer group of the customer at time of order creation.

anonymousId.description: Anonymous session ID for guest checkout orders.

businessUnit.description: Business unit this order belongs to in B2B contexts.

store.description: Store this order was placed in.

lineItems.description: Product line items captured at the time of order creation.

customLineItems.description: Custom line items with user-defined pricing captured at order creation.

totalPrice.description: Total price of all line items and custom line items.

taxedPrice.description: Total price including tax breakdown, available when tax calculation is complete.

taxMode.description: Tax calculation mode used for this order.

taxRoundingMode.description: Rounding mode used for tax calculations.

taxCalculationMode.description: Whether tax is calculated at line item or unit price level.

inventoryMode.description: Inventory tracking mode applied to this order.

orderState.description: High-level lifecycle state of the order.

state.description: Reference to a custom state machine state for the order.

shipmentState.description: Current fulfillment state of the order.

paymentState.description: Current payment state of the order.

billingAddress.description: Billing address captured at order creation.

shippingAddress.description: Primary shipping address captured at order creation.

shippingInfo.description: Shipping method and rate applied to the order.

paymentInfo.description: References to payment resources associated with the order.

discountCodes.description: Discount codes applied to the order.

lineItemCount.description: Total number of line items in the order.

syncInfo.description: Synchronization information for external system integrations.

returnInfo.description: Return information including returned items and refund state.

deliveries.description: Delivery records tracking physical fulfillment of order items.

createdAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the order was created.

lastModifiedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the order was last modified.

completedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the order reached the Complete state.

custom.description: Custom fields and type reference for extended order attributes.

Reference.description: A reference to another commercetools resource by type and ID.

typeId.description: The type identifier of the referenced resource (e.g., 'product', 'customer').

id.description: The system-generated unique identifier of the referenced resource.

Money.description: A monetary value with currency code and amount in the smallest currency unit.

centAmount.description: Amount in the smallest indivisible unit of the currency (e.g., cents for USD).

fractionDigits.description: Number of fraction digits for the currency.

TaxedPrice.description: A price with full tax breakdown including total gross, net, and per-rate tax portions.

taxPortions.description: Breakdown of tax portions by rate and name.

Address.description: A postal address with country and optional structured fields.

id.description: Unique identifier for the address within the resource.

firstName.description: First name of the address recipient.

lastName.description: Last name of the address recipient.

streetName.description: Street name component of the address.

streetNumber.description: Street number component of the address.

additionalStreetInfo.description: Apartment, suite, floor, or other secondary address information.

email.description: Email address associated with this postal address.

phone.description: Phone number associated with this postal address.

LineItem.description: A product line item in an order capturing the product, variant, quantity, and pricing at checkout time.

id.description: Unique identifier for the line item within the order.

productId.description: ID of the product this line item references.

productKey.description: Key of the product at time of order creation.

name.description: Localized name of the product at time of order creation.

quantity.description: Quantity of this product variant ordered.

price.description: The unit price applied to this line item.

totalPrice.description: Total price for this line item (unit price multiplied by quantity).

lineItemMode.description: Whether this is a standard or complimentary gift line item.

priceMode.description: How the price for this line item was determined.

discountedPricePerQuantity.description: Discounted price information per unit quantity.

taxRate.description: Tax rate applied to this line item.

CustomLineItem.description: A custom-priced line item not linked to a product catalog entry.

id.description: Unique identifier for the custom line item.

name.description: Localized name of the custom line item.

money.description: Unit price of the custom line item.

slug.description: User-defined identifier for the custom line item type.

quantity.description: Quantity of this custom line item.

Delivery.description: A delivery record tracking physical fulfillment of order line items.

createdAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the delivery was created.

items.description: Line items and quantities included in this delivery.

parcels.description: Physical parcels within this delivery with tracking information.

address.description: Delivery address for this delivery if different from the order shipping address.

Parcel.description: A physical parcel within a delivery with tracking and measurement details.

createdAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the parcel was created.

measurements.description: Physical dimensions and weight of the parcel.

trackingData.description: Carrier tracking information including tracking ID, carrier name, and URL.

items.description: Line items and quantities packed in this parcel.

ReturnInfo.description: Return information for items being returned from an order.

items.description: Items being returned with quantities and return state.

returnTrackingId.description: Tracking ID for the return shipment.
